title: Vanilla Tweaker
body:
[![GitHub last commit (branch)](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/BananaPuppy/VanillaTweaker/master?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=%23181717&label=Github)](https://github.com/BananaPuppy/VanillaTweaker) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/YkgyoOwX?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=%2300AF5C&label=Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-tweaker) ## Vanilla Tweaker Many common tweaks in one mod!
Configurable!
Config Use & Notes To reload config ***/reloadconfig vtweaker***

**Compost**
• default: Rotten Flesh 10%, Glistening Melon Slice 50%, Poisonous Potato 30%
• "-minecraft:item" is the format for removing*
**Fuel**
• default: Magma Block 1600 *seconds*
• "-minecraft:item" is the format for removing*
**Shield Delay**
• default: 0 *ticks*
• vanilla: 5 *ticks*
**Death Item Despawn**
• default: 1800 *seconds* (30 minutes)
• vanilla: 300 *seconds*
• Never Despawn: >=1940 *seconds*
**disableVillagerRepDecay**
• true
**Silktouch Mob Spawners**
• true
**Right Click Harvest**
• true
### What other changes does this mod make? Bed is never "Too Far Away"
No "Respawn point set" message in hardcore ### Issues & Feature Requests This mod should be compatible with other mods
If you have any issues, or have a feature request
• [Discord](https://discord.gg/rWkXF7pbmG)
• [Github Issue Tracker](https://github.com/BananaPuppy/VanillaTweaker/issues/new/choose)
### Known Issues & Future Features • /reloadconfig doesn't properly remove previously added compostables/fuels sometimes,
requiring a game restart
• Allow death item despawn times greater than 1939 seconds *≈ 32 minutes*
• Custom Villager Rep Decay(up/down) and multiplier instead of on/off
• Rewrite Config implementation to make it cleaner and more foolproof
• Mod Menu Config
• Hot reload config without /reloadconfig vtweaker
• Datapack integration
• API????
